Off Calendar Jun-06-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s motion for post judgment attorneys fees is ordered off calendar in light of the satisfaction of judgment filed on May 12, 2008. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion for appointment of a receiver is granted. No opposition has been filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
